base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemies_atlas — a character (boss) from 1988 super mario bros 3. Full enemy roster — Goomba (regular/micro/para), Koopa Troopa (green/red/shell), Para-Koopa, Paragoomba, Buzzy Beetle, Piranha Plant (red/green + Fire variants), Hammer Bro, Boomerang Bro, Fire Bro, Sledge Bro (Brick Bro), Boo (new!), Chain Chomp (new!), Lakitu, Spiny, Bullet Bill, Banzai Bill, Thwomp, Dry Bones, Bob-omb, Podoboo lava-ball, Cheep Cheep, Blooper, Spike (new!), Rocky Wrench (new!), Boss Bass. 735×1731 tall canvas. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
